## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Docs updated (if user-facing behavior changed)
- [ ] No unnecessary new dependencies
- [ ] Architecture constitution compliance checked
- [ ] ADR added/updated for architecture/security/protocol changes
- [ ] Top-level `src/*` add/remove/rename has ADR link and README tree update
- [ ] No layer-boundary bypass introduced (`security` / `orchestration` / `protocol` paths)
- [ ] Entity-quality impact reviewed (`identity continuity` / `trust coherence` / `taste consistency`) when applicable
